mapper.select: SELECT id, list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reminders WHERE list_id = #{listId} ORDER BY is_completed, sort_order, created_at
SELECT id, list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reminders WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reminders (list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, sort_order) VALUES (#{listId}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{dueDate}, #{priority}, #{isFlagged}, #{isCompleted}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE reminders SET title = #{title}, memo = #{memo}, due_date = #{dueDate}, priority = #{priority}, is_flagged = #{isFlagged}, list_id = #{listId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reminders SET completed_at = IF(is_completed = 0, NOW(), NULL), is_completed = IF(is_completed = 0, 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reminders WHERE DATE(due_date) = CURDATE() AND is_completed = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, created_at

SELECT id, list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reminders WHERE due_date IS NOT NULL AND is_completed = 0 ORDER BY due_date, sort_order

SELECT id, list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reminders WHERE is_completed = 0 ORDER BY list_id, sort_order, created_at

SELECT id, list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reminders WHERE is_flagged = 1 AND is_completed = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, created_at
SELECT id, list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reminders WHERE is_completed = 1 ORDER BY completed_at DESC

SELECT id, list_id, title, memo, due_date, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reminders WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR memo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY is_completed, created_at DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reminders WHERE DATE(due_date) = CURDATE() AND is_completed = 0) AS today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reminders WHERE due_date IS NOT NULL AND is_completed = 0) AS scheduled, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reminders WHERE is_completed = 0) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reminders WHERE is_flagged = 1 AND is_completed = 0) AS flagged, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reminders WHERE is_completed = 1) AS completed
